claims.quote: More than 1,200 interns, residents and fellows train in every medical specialty at UAB in Birmingham, at our regional campuses in Montgomery and Huntsville.
claims.claimText: UAB trains 1,200+ interns, residents and fellows across every medical specialty in Birmingham, Montgomery, and Huntsville.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page describes residency/fellowship program scope and trainee count — clearly GME Tier 2.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: UAB lists 106 training programs, 878 total residents, and 272 total fellows.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Headline GME statistics for residency and fellowship programs — Tier 2.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family GME_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Our office supports all UAB students and recent alumni applying for nationally-competitive fellowships and scholarships. These prestigious awards provide funding for education abroad, research, graduate school, and other academic enrichment opportunities.
claims.claimText: Page is about nationally-competitive academic fellowships/scholarships (Fulbright, Goldwater, Rhodes, Marshall) for undergraduates/alumni, not medical residency or clinical fellowships. URL-based source-family hint (FELLOWSHIP) does not match content.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Content is undergraduate academic-scholarship advising office (Fulbright/Goldwater/Rhodes/Marshall), unrelated to USCE or medical GME fellowships.
claims.limitations: Source-family hint says FELLOWSHIP from URL, but content is academic-scholarship advising, not clinical/GME fellowship.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: UAB lists International Graduate Programs as one of its international programs.
claims.limitations: Ambiguous label; could be graduate school programs rather than GME residency/fellowship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Graduate-level training implies Tier 2 trainee programs; not USCE-eligible for medical students.
